attributes.mlflow.spanInputs: {"query": "I can't log into my account. It says my password is wrong but I'm sure it's correct.", "template_variables": {"company_name": "TechCorp", "context": "User has been a customer for 2 years with no previous issues", "query": "I can't log into my account. Password seems wrong."}}
attributes.mlflow.spanOutputs: {"response": "I'm sorry you're having trouble logging in! This is frustrating, I know. Let's fix this: First, try the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page. If you still can't get in after resetting, I can manually verify your account and send you a secure reset link. Which would you prefer?"}

{"response": "I'm sorry you're having trouble logging in! This is frustrating, I know. Let's fix this: First, try the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page. If you still can't get in after resetting, I can manually verify your account and send you a secure reset link. Which would you prefer?"}
